gist.headline: Tabs are so last year
gist.blurb: Cryonex just landed in our app showcase. It's an all-in-one study assistant built to save students money and banish browser tab clutter forever.
gist.summary: Added Cryonex, an all-in-one study assistant, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Learners can now discover Cryonex in our Learn section, offering a unified study tool that replaces multiple expensive subscriptions.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy study environment. Polly the bee studying at a desk, while the Nomnom creature eats a giant stack of browser tabs to represent 'replacing tabs'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk stacked with books. Next to her, the round tan Nomnom creature is happily eating a stack of glowing digital browser tabs. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
